features: At Vo5 we believe hair shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self-expression
Vo5 Revive Me Daily Shampoo provides lightweight daily refreshment for all hair types
Helps your hair to be refreshed and revived
With 5 vital oils: Argan, Jojoba, Apricot, Avocado and Grapeseed oil
Follow up with Vo5 Revive Me Daily conditioner for an even more effective dose of daily care
description: Product Description At Vo5 we believe hair shouldn’t be dull, life shouldn’t be boring and you should never restrict your self expression. Vo5 Revive Me Daily Shampoo is infused with 5 luscious Vital Oils, designed to nourish and protect your locks. Provides lightweight daily refreshment for all hair types. Enriched with 5 vital oils: Argan, Jojoba, Apricot, Avocado and Grapeseed oil. Vo5 Revive Me Daily Shampoo is a versatile product and is ideal for achieving refreshed and revived hair. How to use: Massage into wet hair, lather and feel the shampoo, with Vital Oils, do its job. Rinse thoroughly. Follow up with Vo5 Revive Me Daily conditioner for a dose of daily care. You’re ready to style! Tip: Create your perfect look with the Vo5 Sleek and Shine range. If you liked Vo5 Revive Me Daily Shampoo, be sure to check out the other Vo5 products in the full range to remix your style and experiment with your hair even further! Don’t forget to leave a product review and share your very best hair tips. Vo5: for hair play whatever your style For more style and music inspiration, follow Vo5 on social. Caution: Avoid contact with eyes. In case of contact, rinse thoroughly with clean water. Ingredients Aqua Sodium Laureth Sulfate Cocamidopropyl Betaine Sodium Chloride Glycerin Argania Spinosa Kernel Oil Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil Persea Gratissima Oil Prunus Armeniaca Kernel Oil Rosmarinus Officinalis Leaf Extract Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil Vitis Vinifera Seed Oil Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride Magnesium Nitrate PEG-45M Parfum Ascorbic Acid Carbomer Magnesium Chloride PPG-12 Dimethiconol PEG-20 Castor Oil TEA-Dodecylbenzenesulfonate TEA-Sulfate Disodium EDTA Trisodium EDTA Glycol Distearate Mica Silica Sodium Sulfate Citric Acid Sodium Hydroxide Triethanolamine DMDM Hydantoin Methylchloroisothiazolinone Methylisothiazolinone Potassium Sorbate Sodium Benzoate Sorbic Acid Hexyl Cinnamal Limonene Linalool CI 77891 Directions Wet hair, apply shampoo, lather, rinse, repeat if necessary.
